message:
refactor(runtime): migrate RuntimeState from std Mutex to ContendedMutex

Replace all Arc<Mutex<RuntimeState>> usages with Arc<ContendedMutex<RuntimeState>>
across the runtime layer to enable lock contention tracking and diagnostics.

- builder.rs: construct ContendedMutex with "runtime_state" label
- mod.rs: re-export ContendedMutex and LockMetricsSnapshot from sync module
- local_queue.rs: update LocalQueue/Stealer state field and test_state helper
- three_lane.rs: update ThreeLaneScheduler and ThreeLaneWorker state fields,
  plus new/new_with_cancel_limit/new_with_options constructors
- worker.rs: update Worker state field and new() constructor signature

This follows the ContendedMutex introduced in 8aab90c and wires it into
all scheduler/worker paths that hold the shared runtime state lock.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
